message:
chore(artifacts): regenerate conformance, cve_arena, release, and runtime_math result bundles

Refresh the tracked verification artifacts to reflect the latest
rch-driven test runs against the resolv hardening and fuzz-harness
safety changes that landed earlier in this batch.

Updated bundles:

- tests/conformance/*.json / *.jsonl
  - alien_cs_e2e_report.v1.json + alien_cs_e2e_trace.v1.jsonl
  - closure_sweep_report.v1.json
  - conformance_coverage_snapshot.v1.json
  - cross_report_consistency.v1.json
  - fixture_pipeline.v1.json + fixture_unit_tests.v1.json
  - fuzz_harness_architecture.v1.json (largest delta — reflects the
    SECCOMP-filter-removal and PTRACE_TRACEME-removal changes in the
    fuzz strategy that landed in fuzz_security_syscalls.rs and
    fuzz_ptrace.rs in this batch)
  - fuzz_membrane_validation.v1.json
  - fuzz_phase1_targets.v1.json + fuzz_phase2_targets.v1.json
  - mode_semantics_matrix.json
  - per_symbol_fixture_tests.v1.json
  - perf_regression_prevention.v1.json
  - reverse_round_contracts.v1.json
  - stub_census.json
  - symbol_tiers_roadmap.v1.json
  - symbol_universe_normalization.v1.json
- tests/cve_arena/results/<bd-id>/
  - artifact_index.json + trace.jsonl + report.json regenerated for
    bd-13ya, bd-146t, bd-15n.2, bd-18qq.4 (uaf_adversarial_detection
    bundle refreshed), bd-1f35 (create_join_churn /
    mixed_detach_join stderr), bd-1qy (mutex
    roundtrip/destroy/contention stderr), bd-24b6, bd-24ug,
    bd-2xp3, bd-ahjd
  - results/*.v1.json roll-up bundles (corpus_normalization,
    format_string_validation, hardened_assertions,
    heap_overflow_validation, integer_overflow_validation,
    paired_mode_evidence, uaf_validation)
- tests/release/dossier_validation_report.v1.json
- tests/runtime_math/admission_gate_report.v1.json
  + controller_ablation_report.v1.json
  + controller_manifest.v1.json

Mechanically regenerated; no semantic test changes here. Skipped the
ephemeral `.beads/beads.db-shm.bad_<timestamp>` SQLite shm backup at
.beads/beads.db-shm.bad_20260424T223421Z, which is gitignore-class
state from a recovery cycle and should not be tracked.
